parameters.formDescription: Paste narration about any football match. Teams will be detected automatically from the text.

values.placeholder: e.g. Real Madrid shocked Bayern Munich 3-1...

assignments.name: text_narration_full
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const lang = $('Form: Video Request').item.json.language || 'English'; const intros = { English: ["Hey, it's Alex! Fresh football news just dropped — listen up... ", "What's up! Alex here, and trust me, you need to hear this... ", "It's your boy Alex, back again! Let me tell you what's going down in football... ", "Yo, Alex here! Big things happening in football today... ", "Hey hey hey! Alex in the house — hottest football takes right here... ", "Alright alright, it's Alex! You know I always bring you the real talk... ", "It's me, Alex! And I've got something wild to tell you today... ", "Back again! Alex here with the latest from the football world... ", "Guys, it's Alex! You are NOT going to believe what just happened... "], French: ["Salut, c'est Alex! Des news fraîches de foot — écoutez bien... ", "Quoi de neuf! Alex ici, et croyez-moi, vous devez entendre ça... ", "C'est moi Alex, encore là! Voilà ce qui se passe dans le foot... ", "Salut les gars, Alex à l'antenne! Les news foot les plus chaudes... "], Portuguese: ["Olá, sou eu, o Alex! Notícias quentes do futebol — prestem atenção... ", "E aí pessoal, Alex aqui! Vocês não vão acreditar no que aconteceu... ", "De volta! Alex com as últimas do futebol para vocês... ", "Oi oi oi, Alex aqui! Coisa grande aconteceu no futebol hoje... "], Swahili: ["Mambo, ni mimi Alex! Habari mpya kabisa za soka — sikilizeni... ", "Habari, Alex hapa! Lazima msikia habari hii ya leo... ", "Niko hapa tena! Alex na habari za hivi karibuni za soka... ", "Vipi marafiki, ni Alex! Jambo kubwa limetokea leo kwenye soka... "] }; const outros = { English: [" Want more red-hot football takes? Jump straight into my WhatsApp channel — link in bio!", " Don't miss out — join my WhatsApp channel for daily football updates! Link in bio!", " Follow me on WhatsApp for all the latest football heat — link in bio!", " That's the tea! Hit my WhatsApp channel for more — link in bio!", " I'll be back with more! Join the WhatsApp channel — link in bio!", " And that's a wrap! Jump on my WhatsApp channel — link in bio!", " Want more fire takes like this? WhatsApp channel — link in bio, go go go!", " Catch me on WhatsApp for even more football madness — link in bio!"], French: [" Tu veux plus de foot? Rejoins ma chaîne WhatsApp — le lien est dans la bio!", " Ne rate rien! Rejoins ma chaîne WhatsApp pour les updates quotidiens — lien dans la bio!", " Pour plus de news foot, suis-moi sur WhatsApp — le lien est dans la bio!", " C'est tout pour aujourd'hui! Rejoins ma chaîne WhatsApp — lien dans la bio!"], Portuguese: [" Querem mais futebol? Entrem no meu canal do WhatsApp — o link está na bio!", " Não percam nada! Sigam meu canal no WhatsApp para atualizações diárias — link na bio!", " Para mais notícias de futebol, me sigam no WhatsApp — link na bio!", " É isso por hoje! Entrem no meu canal do WhatsApp — link na bio!"], Swahili: [" Mnataka habari zaidi za soka? Jiungeni na chaneli yangu ya WhatsApp — link iko kwenye bio!", " Msiache chochote! Jiungeni chaneli yangu ya WhatsApp kwa updates za kila siku — link kwenye bio!", " Kwa habari zaidi za soka, nifuateni kwenye WhatsApp — link ipo kwenye bio!", " Hiyo ndiyo yote kwa leo! Jiungeni chaneli ya WhatsApp — link kwenye bio!"] }; const li = intros[lang] || intros.English; const lo = outros[lang] || outros.English; const intro = li[Math.floor(Math.random() * li.length)]; const outro = lo[Math.floor(Math.random() * lo.length)]; return intro + ($('Form: Video Request').item.json.narration || '') + outro; })() }}
